courses.title: Electrical Lockout/Tagout Level 1
courses.descriptionShort: Fundamental electrical lockout/tagout procedures for maintenance and operations personnel.
courses.descriptionLong: This Level 1 course introduces the core principles of electrical lockout/tagout (LOTO) for technicians, electricians, and maintenance staff. Topics include hazardous energy recognition, written procedure requirements, device selection, verification of zero energy state, and practical examples from industrial facilities. The course aligns with OSHA 1910.147 expectations and includes scenario-based exercises.

courses.title: Electrical Lockout/Tagout Annual Refresher
courses.descriptionShort: Annual refresher on electrical LOTO procedures and common deficiencies.
courses.descriptionLong: Designed for workers who already completed initial electrical LOTO training, this refresher highlights recent incidents, common audit findings, and best practices. The course reinforces verification steps, group LOTO, shift change requirements, and contractor coordination.

courses.title: Machine Safety Overview for Operators
courses.descriptionShort: Introductory course on machine guarding, pinch points, and safe operating practices.
courses.descriptionLong: This course provides machine operators with a practical overview of machine safety principles, including hazard identification, point-of-operation guarding, emergency stops, interlocks, and safe operating procedures. It emphasizes real-world examples from presses, conveyors, and packaging lines.

courses.title: CNC Mill Basic Operation for Production Operators
courses.descriptionShort: Foundational skills for safely operating CNC milling machines in a production environment.
courses.descriptionLong: This hands-on course covers the fundamentals of CNC milling machine operation, including machine setup support, control panel navigation, safe jogging, tool change assistance, basic offsets, and daily maintenance checks. Safety topics include chip control, guarding, and lockout/tagout interfaces.

courses.title: Industrial Press Operator Fundamentals
courses.descriptionShort: Safe operation of mechanical and hydraulic presses for new operators.
courses.descriptionLong: This course introduces operators to the safe operation of mechanical and hydraulic presses. Topics include press components, control modes, die changeover support, guarding systems, two-hand controls, lockout/tagout interfaces, and safe troubleshooting boundaries for operators versus maintenance.

courses.title: Forklift Operator Certification
courses.descriptionShort: Initial training and evaluation for powered industrial truck (forklift) operators.
courses.descriptionLong: This comprehensive course satisfies OSHA requirements for forklift operator training and evaluation. It covers truck classifications, stability and load handling, inspection checklists, pedestrian safety, fueling/charging, and workplace-specific hazards. The course includes classroom theory and a practical driving evaluation.

courses.title: Forklift Operator Refresher & Re-Evaluation
courses.descriptionShort: Refresher training and performance check for experienced forklift operators.
courses.descriptionLong: This refresher course focuses on common incident trends, near-miss analysis, and updated best practices for forklift operation. It includes a brief classroom session followed by practical driving exercises to verify safe operation and address observed deficiencies.

courses.title: Welding Safety and Hot Work Permits
courses.descriptionShort: Control of welding and cutting hazards through hot work permitting and PPE.
courses.descriptionLong: This course covers fire prevention, fume and gas hazards, hot work permitting, and PPE selection for welding and cutting operations. It is intended for welders, fire watch personnel, and supervisors who authorize hot work in production or maintenance environments.

courses.title: Confined Space Entry Safety
courses.descriptionShort: Permit-required confined space entry procedures and atmospheric testing.
courses.descriptionLong: This course introduces participants to confined space definitions, permit systems, atmospheric hazards, ventilation, and rescue considerations. It is suitable for entrants, attendants, supervisors, and safety professionals responsible for confined space programs.

courses.title: OSHA 10-Hour General Industry
courses.descriptionShort: Foundational OSHA general industry outreach training over 10 hours.
courses.descriptionLong: The OSHA 10-Hour General Industry course introduces workers to common safety and health hazards in manufacturing, warehousing, and service industries. Topics include walking-working surfaces, PPE, electrical safety basics, machine guarding overview, hazard communication, and more. Successful participants receive an OSHA 10 card.

courses.title: Self-Paced Machine Operator Safety Orientation
courses.descriptionShort: Self-paced eLearning orientation for new machine operators.
courses.descriptionLong: This self-paced module prepares new hires for machine operator roles. It covers basic safety responsibilities, line-of-fire awareness, PPE expectations, housekeeping, and escalation of abnormal conditions. It can be assigned prior to hands-on machine-specific training.

products.name: ProGuard A3 Cut-Resistant Gloves
products.shortDescription: Lightweight A3 cut-resistant knit gloves with polyurethane palm coating.
products.longDescription: ProGuard A3 Cut-Resistant Gloves provide reliable protection for metal fabrication, assembly, and material handling tasks. The seamless knit shell delivers comfort and dexterity, while the polyurethane palm coating enhances grip on dry and lightly oily parts.

products.name: SteelCore A4 Cut-Resistant Gloves
products.shortDescription: High-durability A4 cut-resistant gloves with sandy nitrile palm.
products.longDescription: SteelCore A4 Cut-Resistant Gloves combine high cut protection with a rugged sandy nitrile coating for excellent grip in oily environments. Ideal for stamping, glass handling, and metal fabrication tasks where higher cut scores are required.

products.name: ClearShield Anti-Fog Safety Glasses
products.shortDescription: Wraparound safety glasses with permanent anti-fog coating.
products.longDescription: ClearShield Anti-Fog Safety Glasses offer lightweight eye protection with a wraparound design for maximum coverage. The lenses feature a permanent anti-fog and anti-scratch coating suitable for humid and high-exertion environments.

products.name: ProVision Safety Glasses with Foam Gasket
products.shortDescription: Impact-rated safety glasses with removable foam gasket for dust control.
products.longDescription: ProVision Safety Glasses provide enhanced protection against dust and flying particles. A removable foam gasket seals gaps around the eyes, while the polycarbonate lenses deliver ANSI-rated impact protection.

products.name: FlowMax 3 HP End Suction Centrifugal Pump
products.shortDescription: 3 HP end suction centrifugal pump for general industrial service.
products.longDescription: The FlowMax 3 HP End Suction Centrifugal Pump is designed for water and light chemical transfer in industrial facilities. It features a cast iron casing, stainless steel impeller, and a 230/460V TEFC motor. Suitable for cooling water, washdown, and utility circulation.

products.name: AquaPro 2 HP Stainless Centrifugal Pump
products.shortDescription: 2 HP stainless steel centrifugal pump for washdown and food applications.
products.longDescription: The AquaPro 2 HP Stainless Centrifugal Pump is constructed with a 316 stainless steel casing and impeller, making it ideal for washdown, food, and light chemical applications. It is close-coupled to a washdown-duty motor and supports CIP operations.

products.name: ProcessLine 1.5 HP Chemical Centrifugal Pump
products.shortDescription: Chemical-duty centrifugal pump with fluoropolymer-lined casing.
products.longDescription: The ProcessLine 1.5 HP Chemical Centrifugal Pump features a fluoropolymer-lined casing and impeller designed for corrosive chemical transfer. It is suitable for plating lines, chemical dosing, and wastewater treatment applications.

products.name: EcoFlow 1 HP Centrifugal Utility Pump
products.shortDescription: Compact 1 HP centrifugal pump for general utility service.
products.longDescription: EcoFlow 1 HP Centrifugal Utility Pump is a compact, energy-efficient solution for light-duty transfer, circulation, and cooling applications. It features a cast iron housing and a durable mechanical seal for long service life.

products.name: ArcGuard 9100 Auto-Darkening Welding Helmet
products.shortDescription: Premium auto-darkening welding helmet with large viewing area.
products.longDescription: The ArcGuard 9100 Auto-Darkening Welding Helmet offers a large viewing area, grind mode, and adjustable sensitivity. Its four-sensor design provides reliable arc detection for MIG, TIG, and stick welding applications.

products.name: LiteView 450 Auto-Darkening Welding Helmet
products.shortDescription: Lightweight auto-darkening helmet with variable shade 9–13.
products.longDescription: The LiteView 450 Auto-Darkening Welding Helmet is engineered for all-day comfort with a low-profile shell and balanced headgear. It offers variable shade 9–13, grind mode, and adjustable delay for automotive and fabrication welding tasks.

products.name: BudgetShield Passive Welding Helmet
products.longDescription: BudgetShield Passive Welding Helmet is a simple, rugged solution for occasional welding tasks. It features a fixed shade 10 lens and durable shell suitable for maintenance shops and training labs.

products.name: SafeRelief 1" 3000 PSI Safety Relief Valve
products.shortDescription: 1 inch safety relief valve rated to 3000 PSI for hydraulic systems.
products.longDescription: The SafeRelief 1" 3000 PSI Safety Relief Valve protects hydraulic circuits and pressure vessels from overpressure conditions. It features a 1" NPT connection, stainless steel internals, and an adjustable set pressure range with factory sealing options.

products.name: SafeRelief 3/4" 3000 PSI Safety Relief Valve
products.shortDescription: 3/4 inch safety relief valve for compact hydraulic manifolds.
products.longDescription: The SafeRelief 3/4" 3000 PSI Safety Relief Valve is suited for compact manifolds and skid systems. It offers reliable overpressure protection with factory set and sealed pressure options.

products.name: QuietZone Pro Earmuffs NRR 27
products.shortDescription: ANSI S3.19 certified earmuffs with NRR 27 for industrial noise.
products.longDescription: QuietZone Pro Earmuffs deliver reliable hearing protection for manufacturing, maintenance, and construction environments. They are ANSI S3.19 certified with an NRR of 27 and feature a padded headband for all-day comfort.

products.name: UltraSilence Earmuffs NRR 30
products.shortDescription: High-attenuation earmuffs with NRR 30 for very loud environments.
products.longDescription: UltraSilence Earmuffs provide maximum hearing protection with an NRR of 30. ANSI S3.19 certified, they are ideal for heavy fabrication, stamping presses, and other very loud industrial operations.

products.name: PowerSolv Industrial Degreaser 1 Gallon
products.shortDescription: Heavy-duty solvent-based degreaser in 1 gallon container.
products.longDescription: PowerSolv Industrial Degreaser quickly removes oil, grease, and grime from machinery, tools, and concrete surfaces. This concentrated formula can be used full strength or diluted, and is packaged in a 1 gallon jug for maintenance shops.

products.name: CitraClean Bio Degreaser 1 Gallon
products.shortDescription: Citrus-based biodegradable degreaser in 1 gallon jug.
products.longDescription: CitraClean Bio Degreaser is a low-VOC, citrus-based formula that cuts through grease while remaining biodegradable and non-caustic. Suitable for equipment cleaning, floors, and parts washers in maintenance and production areas.

products.name: SpillSafe Universal Spill Kit 30 Gallon
products.shortDescription: 30-gallon universal spill kit with absorbents and PPE.
products.longDescription: SpillSafe Universal Spill Kit 30 Gallon contains socks, pillows, pads, disposal bags, and basic PPE to respond to oil and water-based liquid spills. Components are packed in a durable polyethylene overpack drum for quick deployment.

products.name: SpillSafe Chemical Spill Kit 20 Gallon
products.shortDescription: 20-gallon chemical spill kit for acids and caustics.
products.longDescription: SpillSafe Chemical Spill Kit 20 Gallon provides compatible absorbents, neutralizing agents, and PPE for acid and caustic spills. Contents are packed in a 20-gallon polyethylene drum.
